ERRORS.BAD_REQUEST: The request was invalid or cannot be processed. Please check your input.
ERRORS.UNATHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action. Please log in.
ERRORS.FORBIDDEN_ACCESS: Access to this resource is forbidden. You do not have the required permissions.
ERRORS.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found. It may have been removed or does not exist.
ERRORS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again later.
ERRORS.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred. Please contact support if the problem persists.
